title: AvgSpeedClear Method, Spel Class
description: Clears and initializes the average of the absolute speed values for one or more joints.
notes:
AvgSpeedClear clears the average of the absolute speed values for the specified joints.

You must execute AvgSpeedClear before executing AvgSpeed.

This method does not support the PG additional axes.
see_also:
AvgSpeed, PeakSpeed, PeakSpeedClear

AvgSpeedClear Example

VB Example:

m_spel.AvgSpeedClear()

C# Example:

m_spel.AvgSpeedClear();
